Home / Service Areas / El Dorado Hills

Irrigation in El Dorado Hills, CA

Trusted local professionals serving El Dorado Hills and surrounding communities

Serving El Dorado Hills, CA

Summit Irrigation provides premium irrigation services for El Dorado Hills' upscale communities, where summer temperatures often exceed 100°F. We specialize in systems that accommodate the area's rolling terrain and premium landscaping expectations. Our water-efficient designs help property owners maintain lush outdoor spaces while complying with conservation requirements. Whether servicing existing systems or installing new smart irrigation technology, we deliver solutions that meet the exacting standards of El Dorado Hills homeowners and businesses.

This affluent community features extensive landscaping needs in a hot summer climate with water conservation challenges.

Irrigation Services in El Dorado Hills

Irrigation System Installation

Custom-designed sprinkler and drip systems for Sacramento homes and landscapes.

Learn more →

Irrigation System Repairs

Fast, durable fixes for common valley irrigation problems.

Learn more →

Seasonal Adjustments

Climate-appropriate watering schedules for Sacramento's distinct seasons.

Learn more →

Drip Irrigation Solutions

Precision watering for drought-tolerant landscapes and garden beds.

Learn more →

Smart Controller Installation

Weather-responsive irrigation technology for Sacramento yards.

Learn more →

Backflow Testing & Repair

Certified backflow prevention services meeting Sacramento County requirements.

Learn more →

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout El Dorado Hills and the surrounding area.
